headline: NETFLIX IS NOW AVAILABLE IN THE SPECTRUM APP STORE
summary: Spectrum customers can now purchase Netflix in The Spectrum App Store, a digital marketplace that makes it easy to discover, activate, upgrade and purchase streaming services, all in one place. This addition gives Spectrum customers with and without a TV plan a simpler way to buy the ad-supported and ad-free versions of Netflix and access its library of award-winning TV series, movies, games and live events.

headline: Stocks Rally Before the Open on U.S.-Iran Peace Deal
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are up +0.98%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are up +1.64% this morning, pointing to a sharply higher open on Wall Street as sentiment got a boost after U.S. President Donald Trump signed a preliminary agreement to end the Iran war.
